category_sources: Official FastMCP docs describe it as a framework for building MCP servers, clients, and applications.
source_facts.description says FastMCP is a fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
display_name_sources: Official docs page title and text use FastMCP.
source_facts.homepage points to the official FastMCP documentation.
repo_sources: Official FastMCP docs link to PrefectHQ/fastmcp and the contributing guide gives that clone URL.
tags_sources: Official FastMCP docs describe servers, clients, applications, and the Model Context Protocol.
source_facts.description identifies Pythonic MCP server/client building.
